title: Squirrel Removal in Manhattanville, Manhattan | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Manhattanville, Manhattan. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Serving Columbia University area and surrounding neighborhoods. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Manhattanville residents dealing with squirrels in attics, walls, or chimneys need fast, professional removal services. Our experienced team provides humane squirrel extraction and permanent exclusion solutions throughout this vibrant Manhattan neighborhood. We understand the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in Manhattanville's mix of historic brownstones, modern developments, and pre-war buildings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Manhattanville for years with licensed, insured technicians who specialize in urban wildlife removal. We offer same-day emergency service, humane trapping methods, complete attic restoration, and guaranteed exclusion work to prevent re-entry—all with transparent pricing and no hidden fees.
localContext: Manhattanville's proximity to Riverside Park and Morningside Park, combined with the neighborhood's tree-lined streets near Columbia University's Manhattanville campus, creates ideal conditions for squirrel populations. The area's diverse housing stock—from century-old row houses on Old Broadway to new residential towers—each present unique entry points that our technicians expertly identify and seal.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Manhattanville?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Manhattanville typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or damage repair is needed. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes with no hidden charges.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Manhattanville home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Manhattanville. Most squirrel removals are completed within 3-7 days, including trapping, extraction, and sealing entry points. Emergency situations involving squirrels in living spaces are prioritized for immediate response.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Manhattanville buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Manhattanville due to the abundance of mature trees in nearby parks and along residential streets. They frequently enter attics, roof spaces, and wall voids through small gaps in rooflines, vents, and damaged soffits, especially during fall and spring nesting seasons.

faqs.question: Do you use humane squirrel removal methods?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, live-trapping methods compliant with New York City wildlife regulations. After safe removal, we relocate squirrels according to local laws and seal all entry points with durable materials to prevent future infestations, ensuring a permanent solution for your Manhattanville property.
